creator: ilmar@ints.ru
text:
3.3 and 3.4(stable) relnotes says that Tekram-390 based on amd53c974
chipset is not supported. I send-pr driver existence long time ago, it was
included in -current, then in -stable, but you forgot to change the docs. ;-)

Fix: 

Just move the line about Tekram-390 from unsupported drivers to 
supported.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Nothing to repeat.
